Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 348 

PRE_ICL_INP_COPAY_2M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL In-Network Pharmacy Copay for 2-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary copay amount for a 2-month supply of the drugs on this tier, 
using an in-network pharmacy (INP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy) during the pre-initial 
coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME:
